zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Southhill於1462年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯時，她的父親Henry Southill14歲，母親Mrs. Elisabeth Southill10歲。她於大約1485年與Sir John Harrington在英國英格蘭薩默塞特凱爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年12月4日在英國越可爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭盧特藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Southhill于1462年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯时，她的父亲Henry Southill14岁，母亲Mrs. Elisabeth Southill10岁。她于大约1485年与Sir John Harrington在英国英格兰薩默塞特凱爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年12月4日在英国越可爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰盧特藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Southhill was born in 1462, in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Southill, was 14 and her mother, Mrs. Elisabeth Southill, was 10. She married Sir John Harrington about 1485, in Kelston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 December 1530, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Southhill est née en 1462, à Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Southill, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elisabeth Southill, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Harrington environ 1485, à Kelston, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 décembre 1530, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Southhill 1462 in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Southill 14 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Elisabeth Southill 10. Sie hat um 1485 in Kelston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir John Harrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Dezember 1530 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Rutland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Southhill è nata il nel 1462 nel Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Southill, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Elisabeth Southill, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Harrington circa 1485, nel Kelston, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1530, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Southhillが1462年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアルッテルウオルスで生まれた時，父Henry Southillは14歳，母Mrs. Elisabeth Southillは10歳であった。約1485年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトケルストンでSir John Harringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年12月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスルトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Southhill(이)가 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 루터워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Southill(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Elisabeth Southill(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 켈스턴에서 Sir John Harrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 12월 4일 영국 요르크실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Southhill nasceu em 1462, em Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Southill, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Elisabeth Southill, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Harrington aproximadamente 1485, em Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1530, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Witham on the Hill, Lincolnshire, Englan: витам он т хилл, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Southhill родилась в 1462 г. в местности луттирворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Southill было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elisabeth Southill, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Harrington около 1485 г. в местности келстон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 декабря 1530 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности рутланд, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir John Harrington aproximadamente 1485, en Kelston, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1530, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
